queue.ask: Parallax through windows was removed after 4 failed tuning attempts. What should the exterior through windows look like? Options: (1) Static painted backgrounds per altitude band, (2) No exterior at all — solid walls, (3) Simple color gradient that shifts with altitude, (4) Completely different approach. The window-frame reference grid makes position-based parallax feel wrong.
queue.transfer_value: Unblocks the visual identity of the tower interior.

queue.ask: What scene tree structure do you want for the sim interior?
queue.notes: Resolved: Sim > Floor0..9 (StaticBody2D) > Block nodes + Breaker panel + NPC CharacterBody2Ds + Stairs. Structure proven stable.

queue.ask: Screenshots from the browser version: (1) ground level, (2) mid-tower, (3) near-space altitude, (4) control room interior, (5) a floor interior with modules.
Crate count escalation (2 for floors 1-5, 4 for floors 6-10): linear difficulty or midpoint inflection?
queue.transfer_value: Establishes difficulty philosophy for all future content.

queue.notes: Resolved through iterative tuning: SPEED=200, SPRINT=340, JUMP_MIN=-425, JUMP_MAX=-750, GRAVITY=900, DROP_MIN=0.08s. User validated through play.
